criteria.criterion: DBB-001: GET /api/health returns HTTP 200 with JSON body containing ollama, stt, tts status fields
DBB-002: Health endpoint reflects degraded components (ollama unreachable shows degraded status)
DBB-003: Health endpoint available when no engines registered (returns valid response, not 500)
DBB-004: Error responses include code field — apiError() and errorHandler both return { error: { message, type, code } }
DBB-005: Error format on missing model — /v1/chat/completions does not validate model param against available models; no model_not_found code returned
DBB-006: Error format on missing required fields — POST /v1/chat/completions with empty body returns 400 with code 'missing_required_field'
DBB-007: Invalid audio file returns 4xx — isValidAudio() magic bytes check returns 400 with code 'invalid_audio_format'
DBB-008: Valid audio formats accepted — wav, mp3, ogg, flac, webm, mp4/m4a, amr signatures recognized
DBB-009: Empty audio file returns 4xx — isValidAudio() returns false for buffer.length < 12

DBB-010: ARCHITECTURE.md has no stale references — removed file references (memory.js, ConfigPanel, LocalModels, CloudModels, App-old.vue) are gone; known-limitations at lines 748-749 still list audio validation and error format as missing (stale but not file references)
DBB-011: Existing tests still pass — 150 test files, 0 failures per vitest results.json
DBB-012: Health endpoint response time < 2s — implementation uses AbortSignal.timeout(2000) for Ollama check
